title: adenophyllum porophylloides
intro: Adenophyllum porophylloides, also known as "hierba del barro," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenophyllum porophylloides include treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Adenophyllum porophylloides can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
